raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Gann es eſmu Nabbata
Affini un winna Behrnu Affint
wakar Waktarâ redſejs/ fakka
tas KUNGS: Un es tew to
gann makfaschu us fcho paschu
Tihrumu/ fakka tas KUNGS:
Un nu nemm/ un mett winnu us
to Tihrumu/ pehz ta KUNGA
Wahrdu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu Akasjus tas Keh-
nisch no Juhdâ to redſeja / tad
behdse wiꞥſch us taDahrfa Nam-
ima Zelftu. Bet Jeüs dsinnahs
tam pakkat/ un fazzija: Kanjeet
fcho arridsan us teem Ratteim /
augſcham eijoht us Guru / kas
pee Jeblaäma irr / un wiꞥſch
behdse us Megiddu/ un nouir-
re tur.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna Kaspi nowedde
to us Jerusalemi/ un aprakfe to
winna Kappâ pee winna Teh-
weem Dahwida Pilli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Weenpadesruitâ Gaddâ
Jorama Akaba Dehla/ bija A-
kasjus par Kehnizu tappis pahr
Juhdn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad Jeüs us Iſtreëli
nahze/ un Iſebele to dsirdeja/ tad
padarrija winna favu Waigu
jauku/ un tsqresnoja favu Gal-
wu / un skattijahs zaur Lohgu
ahra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu Jeüs zaur Wahr-
u eenahze/ tad fazzija ta: Ar-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch pazehle faw-
Azzis us to Lohgu / un fazzij
Kas turr ar manni? kas jell
tad skattijahs us to fahdi dti
trihs Kambar-Junkuzi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas fazzija : Gabſe
winnu no augſchens femmē
un tee nogahſe winnu no au-
tchenes/ ta ka no winnas Aff
nim ta Seena un tee Sirgi a
traipiti tappe/ un wiꞥſch f
minne to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu wiꞥſch bija e
nahzis/ un ehdis un dsehris/ t
fazzija wiꞥſch : Aptuhkojeet-jel
fcho Nolahdetu / un aprohze
to/ jo winna irr weena Kehnia
Meita.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet kad tee nogahje wi-
nu aprakt/ tad tee ne atradde i
tahs ne neeka/ ka ween to Sm-
dsenes Kansu / un tahs Kahja
un winnas Plaukſtes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nahze tee atpak-
nn stabstija winnam to / i
wiꞥſch fazzija: Tas irr ta KUD
GA Wahrdg / ko wiꞥſch ru
najs irr zaur favu Kalpu Elij
ju to Tisbiteri/ fazzidams : l
Iſtreëles Tihrumu buhs tee
Sunneem Iſebeles Meetu ehſi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta tappe Iſebeles Mai-
ka Suhdi Lauka Wirſû/ us Je-
reëles Tihrumu / ka ne warre
fazzizht : Schi irr Iſebele.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
